desc: a polymorphic model-guard nested inside an if-block is hoisted to a local so it narrows on Solid (Spike-012 BUG-4 — hoistPolymorphicModelGuards' Shape-2 generalized to control-flow-nested statements); pre-fix it was left un-narrowed (Solid TS2322), and earlier still it emitted an undeclared `v` (73-10 CR-01, TS2304)
